✿ — TEACHER AU — ✿

He caught you not paying attention in class. Oh uh.

! UPDATED !

Hello loves! After realizing this bot did kind of started to get some attention, I decided to rework it a little bit. I’m not sure if I’ll be posting any more bots, since I’m quite the busy woman. (╥_╥)

Thank you for the lovely support, means a lot <3 I hope you guys enjoy the rework!

Note: I just wanted to clarify that the way the bot responds to you is not my fault. I have never scripted the bot to say out of pocket things. ♡´･ᴗ･`♡
